notes: Generate three unique secrets using a cryptographically secure RNG. Follow encoding and length constraints exactly.

requirements.name: API_KEY
requirements.description: Lowercase hex, 64 characters (32 bytes encoded as hex).

requirements.name: SESSION_TOKEN
requirements.description: Base64 URL-safe (A-Z, a-z, 0-9, -, _), exactly 64 characters, no '=' padding.

regeneration_guidance: Use openssl rand. For base64 URL-safe, replace '+' and '/' with '-' and '_' and strip '=' padding. For alphanumeric password, filter with tr -dc and cut to exact length. For hex key, use lowercase hex output.
